EJSCREEN Documentation

Source: vignettes/ejscreen.Rmd
ejscreen.Rmd

EJSCREEN originally provided extensive documentation and help through the EJSCREEN website (e.g., overviews and how to interpret reports) and documents available for download, such as the User Guide (how to use the app) and the Technical Documentation (how indicators are calculated).

In 2025, before EPA took down the EJSCREEN website and documents, they were archived by the Wayback Machine. The webpages and documents on archive.org load slowly, so copies of some key documents are also made available here, for easy access.

Below are links to archived copies of selected publicly-available EJSCREEN webpages and documents from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) as of 2025, when the EPA-hosted open source EJAM project was archived by the Wayback Machine (an initiative of the Internet Archive) and by EJAM-related repositories.

Selected Documents

Help with How to Use EJSCREEN

  • EJSCREEN User Guides (.pdf docs)

    • EJSCREEN Overall User Guide (aka EJSCREEN walkthrough). Also at archive.org

    • EJSCREEN Multisite Tool User Guide (aka EJAM walkthrough). Also at archive.org

Documentation of Data Sources and Technical Methods

  • Changes in 2025

    • EJSCREEN / EJAM developments in 2025

  • Data Sources (2024 through 2025)

    • Full list of indicators, with definitions. Also at archive.org

    • Key environmental indicators with year and source of each. Also at archive.org

    • Key socioeconomic indicators. Also at archive.org

    • EJSCREEN Change Log (newest indicators, etc.)

    • Old API-provided list of indicators

    • Raw Data Downloads – EJSCREEN datasets as used by EJAM

      • Datasets stored in the EJAM repository (.rda files): Documentation and Data files
      • Datasets stored in the ejamdata repo (large .arrow files): Documentation and Data files

  • Methods (development of indicators, calculations for community reports, etc.)

    • EJSCREEN Technical Doc. (as saved for EJAM): Detailed documentation of EJSCREEN methods (2024) for Version 2.3 (7/31/2024), .pdf manual (also at archive.org)

    • Documentation of EJAM software that generates EJSCREEN reports (from 2025 on): ejanalysis.org/ejamdocs

Original EJScreen Website Homepage

EJScreen: Environmental Justice Screening and Mapping Tool

EJScreen is EPA’s environmental justice mapping and screening tool that provides EPA with a nationally consistent dataset and approach for combining environmental and socioeconomic indicators.

EPA is committed to protecting the environment and public health in low-income, tribal and other overburdened communities by integrating environmental justice in all programs, policies and activities.

Launch the EJScreen Tool

Tool Basics and Uses Learn to Use EJScreen Technical Information and Data Downloads
Explore these helpful resources to gain a solid understanding of EJScreen’s concepts and uses. Explore these introductory videos, guides, and training sessions. Download data and find detailed information about the technical aspects of EJScreen.
Explore concepts and uses Learn about the tool Dive into details
